refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall provide detailed worksite area analysis by identifying terrain features, detecting obstacles, and representing work-zone boundaries.
refined_fr.rationale: Breaking down the broad worksite mapping requirement into specific sub-functions ensures clarity and targeted design solutions for terrain analysis, obstacle detection, and work-zone representation.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Verify by generating a worksite model/map that includes terrain contours, obstacle locations, and clearly marked work-zone boundaries, validated against ground truth data.
sub_frs: Analyze terrain features of the worksite area
Detect and locate obstacles within the worksite
Represent and update work-zone boundaries on the worksite model

candidate_dps: Terrain analysis via LIDAR and sensor fusion
Obstacle detection using computer vision and sensor data
Work-zone representation through GIS-based mapping and dynamic updates
selected_dp.selected_dp: Terrain analysis via LIDAR and sensor fusion; Obstacle detection using computer vision and sensor data; Work-zone representation through GIS-based mapping and dynamic updates

potential_sources: Data dependencies between terrain and obstacle detection
Shared data structures for work-zone representation
coupling_check.notes: The selected DPs are logically cohesive and modular, with well-defined data flows minimizing tight coupling.

assumptions_risks: Assumes availability of high-fidelity sensors (LIDAR, cameras)
Risk of sensor data inaccuracies affecting model quality
High safety criticality demands robust error handling
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider adding redundancy in sensor data processing to mitigate risks.

im_boundary.name: NGHE Solution
im_boundary.scope: Centralized processing and integration of terrain analysis, obstacle detection, and work-zone representation functions.

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Receives raw sensor data (LIDAR, cameras) from Vehicle and Teleoperation modules.

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Sends processed worksite model data to Vehicle and Teleoperation for planning and execution.

external_interfaces.name: SafetyAlert
external_interfaces.details: Issues alerts related to detected obstacles and unsafe work-zone conditions to Safety Services.

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Supports data exchange between NGHE Solution and other modules for real-time updates.

module_containment_scores.notes: High containment as core processing is centralized here; low diffusion risk.
Limited containment; risk of duplicated processing if assigned here.
Low containment; high diffusion risk due to potential duplication.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Centralizing the worksite mapping functions within the NGHE Solution module minimizes diffusion and supports integrated data processing.
containment_risks: Potential bottleneck if NGHE Solution module becomes too large or complex
Dependency on reliable network link for real-time data exchange
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Monitor module complexity and consider sub-module decomposition within NGHE Solution if needed.

fr_dp_gate.reason: The refined FRs are well-defined and the selected DPs logically satisfy the sub-FRs with manageable coupling.

diffusion_risks: Low diffusion risk due to centralized containment in NGHE Solution module
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Containment scores strongly favor NGHE Solution, supporting clear ownership and minimal duplication.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification can be performed by testing the integrated worksite model generation and its interfaces with Vehicle and Safety Services.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of functions to NGHE Solution with well-defined external interfaces.

recommended_revisions: Add redundancy and error handling in sensor data processing to address safety criticality.
Plan for scalability within NGHE Solution to avoid module complexity bottlenecks.

decision.justification: The current level of functional decomposition, DP selection, and IM assignment meet the requirements and constraints with acceptable risk and clear ownership.
next_level_sub_frs: Analyze terrain features of the worksite area
Detect and locate obstacles within the worksite
Represent and update work-zone boundaries on the worksite model

revise.why: No immediate revisions required; proceed to next decomposition level.

assumptions: High-fidelity sensor data is available and reliable.
Network link supports real-time data exchange without significant latency.
open_risks: Sensor data inaccuracies impacting model quality.
Potential complexity growth in NGHE Solution module.
evidence_needed: Sensor data accuracy and reliability reports.
Performance metrics of NGHE Solution under load.
